title: FUJI ABSOLUTE 2.3 (MSRP $449)
content:
FUJI ABSOLUTE 2.3 (MSRP $449)

Known for versatility, the Absolute's geometry strikes a balance between speed and comfort, making it ideal for the fitness-minded rider, or the urbanite looking to ride to work or run errands.
  • A2-SL custom butted aluminum frame
  • Linear pull brakes
  •  Wide range gearing
  • Rack and fender mounts
  • Step-thru and diamond frame options for most models
  • Proven Shimano drivetrain components on all models

SCHWINN CYCLONE BIKE PUMP (MSRP $20)

The Schwinn Dual Head Floor Pump makes every pump count when you inflate your bike tires. The 20 large steel barrel inflates quickly and the 120PSL gauge keeps your tires inflated at the proper pressure. Dual headed design allows for attachment to both Presta (high pressure tires) and Schrader valves to be stress-free. A wide base provides stability, while an extra-long 25 hose gives you incredible flexibility in pumping your tires.


EPIPHONE LES PAUL STANDARD (MSRP $599)

The Epiphone Les Paul Standard is the world’s most popular electric guitar with a solid Mahogany body and Maple top for the same classic tone that helped to make the Les Paul the world’s most popular solid body electric guitar. The Epiphone Les Paul Standard is powered by two Alnico Classic™ humbuckers with Alnico-V magnets, which provide a slightly higher output than vintage pickups and also have enhanced mids and highs. Each pickup has a Volume and Tone control with vintage-styled Amber 'Top Hats" knobs plus Epiphone’s all-metal 3-way pickup selector switch.
